## Title: Fix nFAPI P7 CRC indication packing and bounds checking

### Summary
The nFAPI P7 CRC indication packing functions contained multiple issues that could cause buffer overflows, incorrect serialization, and process crashes. The `pack_crc_indication_body_value()` function used an assert that would terminate the process when PDU count exceeded `NFAPI_CRC_IND_MAX_PDU`, rather than returning an error gracefully. Additionally, the instance length calculation lacked bounds checking, risking un
